list.name: ri
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri FROM monitoring.fact_site_event ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS energy_kwh FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_kwh DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT s.site_type::text AS site_type, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS cfp_kg FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cfp_kg DESC;

SELECT s.description AS site, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS energy_kwh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS cfp_kg FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_kwh DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri, s.description AS site, s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS jobs, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS energy_kwh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS cfp_kg FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE $ri AND s.site_type::text LIKE $site_type AND s.description LIKE $site GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY cfp_kg DESC LIMIT 200;
